title: Malty Molten Syrian Almonds Tagine
description: A rich and indulgent Syrian dessert featuring flaked almonds, namul, and a hint of sweetness, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine almond milk, dates, namul, and honey.
Blend until smooth and creamy, pausing to scrape down the sides as needed.
Transfer the mixture to a saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and forms a smooth paste.
Remove from heat and stir in butter, cinnamon, cardamom, and salt until melted and well combined.
Pour the mixture into individual ramekins or small baking dishes.
Sprinkle a layer of flaked almonds on top of each ramekin.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
